history.content:
<thought>
The goal O is visible ahead and to the right. The cell directly in front of me is lava, so I should not go forward. The safe move is to rotate clockwise to orient toward the open path.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
The goal O is visible in the local view, but it is not directly reachable from here because the path ahead is blocked by a wall. The cell in front of me is a wall, so I cannot move forward. I need to turn to find a safe open direction; turning counter-clockwise should orient me toward the open floor cells on my left side.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_ANTI_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
The cell directly in front of me is lava, so moving forward would be fatal. The goal is visible to the right side in the open area, so I should rotate clockwise to face a safe direction and continue navigating around the lava.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
Estou virado para cima, pois o `^` está na parte inferior do mapa. A célula imediatamente à frente é `.` (segura), então posso avançar em direção ao espaço livre. O objetivo `O` está à esquerda e mais acima, mas o primeiro passo seguro é seguir para frente.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
The goal O is visible just to my left, but there is a lava cell L directly between me and the goal, so I cannot move left toward it safely. The open path seems to be to move right into the free cell and then navigate around the obstacle.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
The goal O is immediately to my left, but there is lava L also nearby on that side. Since I am facing upward, moving forward would hit a wall (#). I need to rotate to align with a safe approach toward the goal, avoiding the lava cell.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_ANTI_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I’m facing up, and the cell directly ahead is a wall, so I cannot move forward. The goal O is visible up and to the left relative to my current position, so I should rotate to face a direction that can help me approach it.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_ANTI_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
O objetivo O está visível à direita e um pouco à frente. Há lava imediatamente à frente, então não posso seguir em frente com segurança. Vou girar no sentido anti-horário para me orientar em direção a uma célula livre.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_ANTI_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am facing upward. The cell directly in front of me is free, so I can move forward safely. There is no visible goal yet, but advancing is the best next step to explore.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I see a clear floor cell directly in front of me, and no immediate goal or lava is visible. Moving forward is safe and progresses into the open area.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am facing upward, and the cell directly in front of me is unknown, while the cells to my right are open floor. Since there is no visible goal yet and moving forward is not clearly safe, I will turn clockwise to face the open path.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
The goal O is visible in front-right of my current position, but the cell directly ahead contains lava, so moving forward would be deadly. I should rotate counter-clockwise to face a safer direction and try to navigate around the lava.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_ANTI_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
In front of me there is a free floor cell '.', so the safest progress is to move forward rather than turning.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
There is open floor directly in front of me, so the safest useful move is to go forward and continue exploring toward the unknown area.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I can see a clear floor cell directly in front of me, while the visible area is otherwise mostly unknown and blocked by walls on the sides. Moving forward is safe and lets me explore toward the open space.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>
